summary: Comprehensive testing of PO Draft Generation feature (iteration_73). Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Backend insert_one with _id:None causing 500 errors - changed to draft.copy(), (2) Frontend 'actions' used before initialization in ActionCenterPanel - reordered variable declarations. All 20 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass.

fixed.issue: MongoDB insert_one with _id:None caused duplicate key error (E11000)

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

fixed.issue: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'actions' before initialization - eligibleForPO and selectedEligible used 'actions' variable before it was defined
fixed.fix: Moved `const summary = data?.action_summary || {}` and `const actions = data?.actions || []` before the eligibleForPO computation

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft creates PO draft for valid item
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft returns po_draft_id, lines, total_qty, total_lines, status=draft
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft multiple items in single draft
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft invalid qty (zero) returns 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft invalid qty (negative) returns 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft nonexistent item returns 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft nonexistent customer returns 404
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft empty items array returns 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft duplicate within 5 minutes returns 409
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts lists drafts by customer_id
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts?status=X filters by status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status updates status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/nonexistent/status returns 404
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status?status=invalid returns 422
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/item-detail shows last_po_draft when PO draft exists
Backend REGRESSION: Action Center endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Supply Coverage endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Demand signals endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Exceptions endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary still works
Frontend: Action Center tab visible (inv-tab-action-center)
Frontend: Summary cards render (5 Shortages, 2 Coverage Risk, 3 Demand Gaps, 5 Reorder, 8 No Incoming)
Frontend: Select-all checkbox found (data-testid='inv-action-select-all')
Frontend: Row checkboxes found (inv-action-select-0 through inv-action-select-4)
Frontend: Generate PO Draft button appears when items selected (data-testid='inv-generate-po-btn')
Frontend: PO Draft result confirmation shows draft ID (data-testid='inv-po-draft-result', 'inv-po-draft-id')
Frontend: Item detail drawer shows Last PO Draft section (data-testid='inv-detail-po-draft')
Frontend REGRESSION: Action Center panel loads correctly
Frontend REGRESSION: Supply Coverage tab still works
Frontend REGRESSION: Demand tab still works
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 889-960: POST /generate-po-draft endpoint correctly validates customer, items, and handles duplicate guard
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 963-977: GET /po-drafts correctly filters by customer_id and status
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 980-995: PATCH /po-drafts/{id}/status correctly updates status with validation
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1103-1107: item-detail correctly includes last_po_draft from po_drafts collection
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 824-1036: ActionCenterPanel component includes multi-select, generatePO, and draft result display
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Items: IMPORT-ITEM-B, IMPORT-ITEM-C, SPAM-LITE, TEST-IMPORT-A402AED7, TEST-ITEM-WARN. PO drafts created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Draft Generation feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/inventory-ledger/generate-po-draft (customer_id, items[{item, recommended_qty, source}]), GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts?customer_id=X&status=Y, PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status?status=X. Response structure: {po_draft_id, created_at, customer_id, customer_name, lines[], source, status, total_qty, total_lines}. Duplicate guard: 5-minute window checks po_drafts for same customer+item+status=draft. Frontend: ActionCenterPanel has checkboxes on eligible rows (reorder/coverage_risk/shortage), Generate PO Draft button (inv-generate-po-btn), draft result display (inv-po-draft-result), ItemDetailDrawer shows last_po_draft (inv-detail-po-draft). BUGS FIXED: (1) Backend _id:None in insert_one, (2) Frontend 'actions' used before declaration.

errors.422: Invalid qty, nonexistent item, empty items

item_detail_last_po_draft.condition: Present when PO draft exists for item, null otherwise

action_center_multi_select.eligible_rows: Items with reorder, coverage_risk, or shortage action types

draft_result_display.shows: Draft ID, lines count, total qty, item list
